hero.headline: AI that answers every call and captures every client opportunity.
hero.subheadline: CallerCore is the AI intake system for service businesses — answering calls, capturing leads, and keeping your front office moving now, with a platform built to expand as you grow.

problem.title: Unanswered calls are unbooked revenue
problem.intro: Service businesses lose thousands every month to calls nobody answers — because someone's with a customer, on a job, or it's after hours.

stats.label: of calls to service businesses go unanswered during peak hours
average revenue lost per missed service call
of callers who reach voicemail call a competitor instead
coverage after hours, on weekends, or when your team is busy

solution.title: One platform. Every layer connected.
solution.quote: We answer every call. Capture every lead. Run your front office. Automatically.

stack.label: INPUT
stack.title: AI Phone Agent
stack.description: Answers every call, 24 hours a day, in natural conversation — not a scripted menu. It follows context, handles questions on the fly, qualifies the caller, and books the job or transfers to a human.

stack.label: PROCESS
stack.title: Lead Engine
stack.description: Every conversation is parsed automatically — name, contact info, intent, urgency — and routed into your pipeline with zero manual entry.

stack.label: OUTPUT
stack.title: Instant Follow-Up
stack.description: Missed or after-hours contacts get an automatic text within seconds — so they hear from you before they think to call anyone else.

stack.label: RECORD
stack.title: Always-On Memory
stack.description: Nothing lives in a notepad or a sticky note. Every interaction is logged, searchable, and ready for your team the next morning.

pricing.title: Compare plans side by side
pricing.intro: One flat setup fee, then a monthly plan that scales with you. Every feature below carries forward into the tiers above it — nothing gets swapped out, only added.
pricing.note: Overage billed at $0.30/min beyond your included minutes. No long-term contract required.
